item.title: Codex and GPT-4.1 availability expands for developers
item.description: API developers can use Codex with new model availability on partner platforms.

item.title: Customer story mentions Codex
item.description: ExampleCo uses Codex in an internal workflow with GPT-4.1.

item.title: Company acquisition mentions developer workflows
item.description: The post mentions Codex and developer workflows but does not announce a provider API, model, pricing, quota, or availability change.
